reuseTenantFromFlow01: Same acme-pro-members sub-tenant; this profile layers FLOW-02 FREEDOM overrides on top of FLOW-01 overrides already published for that tenant.

flow02_match_weight_industry.rationale: Acme Pro tenant prioritizes same-industry peer matching (developer community with strong industry-specialization value)

flow02_match_weight_stage.rationale: De-emphasize business stage for peer matching; developer peer matches valuable across stages

flow02_match_weight_location.rationale: Remote-first tenant; location proximity a minor signal

flow02_match_weight_team.rationale: Team size tier minor signal for peer matching in developer community

flow02_match_timeout_seconds.rationale: Tighter tenant SLA; acme users expect matching within 15s instead of default 30s
flow02_match_timeout_seconds.carryForwardGap: Gap-FLOW-02-B: FREEDOM key registered in config-schema but CompatibilityScoringService currently uses input.timeoutMs ?? DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS (server:line 109). Service wiring to freedomConfig is a future patch; profile pre-declares the desired tenant value.

flow02_debounce_window_seconds.rationale: Smaller tenant; shorter debounce for quicker re-matching after profile edits
flow02_debounce_window_seconds.carryForwardGap: Gap-FLOW-02-B: FREEDOM key registered in config-schema but no service reads it yet. Profile pre-declares the desired tenant value.

deploymentInstructions.seedMethod: IFreedomConfigService.set() per key, within tenant's AsyncLocalStorage context
deploymentInstructions.sampleSeedScript: for (const [key, cfg] of Object.entries(overrides)) { await cls.runWith({ tenantId }, () => freedomConfig.set(key, cfg.value)); }

verificationContract.allPassed: TBD — to be populated after jest run in Phase 2

machineInvariantsPreserved: Event names: BusinessProfileCreated, UserSegmentAssigned, LearningPathAssigned, BusinessMatchesFound, SuggestionsGenerated, MatchingPageRendered, PersonalizationCompleted
Business profile schema: dual-record write (PRIVATE xiigen-business-profiles + GLOBAL xiigen-matching-profiles); GLOBAL restricted to 4 match-safe fields
knowledge_scope literals: GLOBAL (matching), PRIVATE (profiles + matches + segments)
DNA-8 outbox ordering: storeDocument before enqueue (all services)
DNA-7 idempotency: sha256 key for scoringId; same idempotencyKey returns same scoringId
TIMEOUT-AS-SUCCESS-MODE: partialResults=true on timeout, not failure
